query:
INSERT INTO badges (name, description, icon, tier, criteria) VALUES
('First Steps', 'Complete your first course', '🎯', 'bronze', '{"type":"courses_completed","count":1}'),
('Quick Learner', 'Complete 3 courses', '📚', 'bronze', '{"type":"courses_completed","count":3}'),
('Knowledge Seeker', 'Complete 5 courses', '🔍', 'silver', '{"type":"courses_completed","count":5}'),
('Course Master', 'Complete 10 courses', '🏆', 'gold', '{"type":"courses_completed","count":10}'),
('Learning Legend', 'Complete 25 courses', '👑', 'platinum', '{"type":"courses_completed","count":25}'),
('Quiz Whiz', 'Pass 5 quizzes with 90%+', '🧠', 'silver', '{"type":"quiz_high_score","count":5}'),
('Perfect Score', 'Get 100% on any quiz', '💯', 'gold', '{"type":"quiz_perfect","count":1}'),
('Streak Starter', 'Maintain a 3-day streak', '🔥', 'bronze', '{"type":"streak_days","count":3}'),
('On Fire', 'Maintain a 7-day streak', '⚡', 'silver', '{"type":"streak_days","count":7}'),
('Unstoppable', 'Maintain a 30-day streak', '🌟', 'gold', '{"type":"streak_days","count":30}'),
('Dedicated Learner', 'Spend 10 hours learning', '⏰', 'silver', '{"type":"time_spent_hours","count":10}'),
('Marathon Runner', 'Spend 50 hours learning', '🏃', 'gold', '{"type":"time_spent_hours","count":50}');
